ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform where the product is listed */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings for the product */,
  "original_price" REAL /* Original price of the product */,
  "discounted_price" REAL /* Discounted price of the product */,
  "product_url" TEXT /* URL of the product page */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the product (e.g., available, out of stock) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the product */,
  "shipping_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product for shipping purposes */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (length, width, height) */,
  "warranty_info" TEXT /* Information about the product's warranty */,
  "return_policy" TEXT /* Information about the return policy for the product */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Current inventory count */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform (e.g., Amazon, eBay) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the platform was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the platform */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Status of the platform (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the seller */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the seller was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the seller */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the seller (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sellers" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method (e.g., free shipping, express shipping) */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the shipping information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the shipping information */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES shipping_addresses ("shipping_address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image for accessibility */,
  "primary_image" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the image is the primary image for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the review */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID to link users to roles */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (pending, shipped, delivered, canceled) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES billing_addresses ("billing_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES shipping_addresses ("shipping_address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the brand was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, seller, customer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing permissions for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code or postal code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the address was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing_addresses" (
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing address */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code or postal code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the address was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_address_id")
)
